history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A grayscale, high-contrast, medium shot photo of a person taking a selfie in a bathroom mirror. The person has dark, spiky hair and is wearing a black zip-up hoodie adorned with sparkling star patterns made of small dots and larger star shapes. A delicate chain necklace is visible under the hoodie's collar. The phone being used for the selfie has a black case with similar star designs. The background is a bathroom with tiled walls and a wooden door. The lighting is somewhat harsh, creating strong shadows and highlights, contributing to a dramatic and edgy mood. The overall aesthetic is modern and stylish, with a focus on the intricate details of the clothing and accessories.
